pm_research_plan: # Research Plan: Tuition Centre in Sungai Petani, Kedah --- ## Problem An aspiring entrepreneur wants to open a tuition centre in Sungai Petani, Kedah but lacks localized intelligence on market demand, competitive landscape, viable locations, pricing norms, regulatory requirements, and go-to-market strategy. Without evidence-based insights, there is high risk of misaligned positioning, poor location choice, undercapitalization, and failure to differentiate from established rivals. --- ## Target Users - **Primary:** Parents of primary (UPSR/PT3/SPM) and secondary school students in Sungai Petani seeking academic tuition - **Secondary:** Students themselves (especially SPM/STPM candidates), school teachers seeking supplementary income through tuition - **Tertiary:** Working professionals or pre-primary parents (early childhood tuition segment) --- ## MVP Goal Validate whether a tuition cen ... [compressed 4650 chars] ... ses, result guarantees, teacher qualifications, or peer referrals? --- ## Decision Criteria - **Location:** Must balance foot traffic, proximity to schools, rental cost, and parking/accessibility - **Pricing:** Must align with local willingness-to-pay while sustaining unit economics - **Subject-Grade Focus:** Prioritize combinations with highest unmet demand and lowest competitive saturation - **Regulatory:** Full compliance is non-negotiable; any licensing blocker kills the concept - **MVP Scope:** Start with 2–3 subjects, 1–2 grade levels, single location — expand only after validated demand
